actions.intent: Open with generic top cleanup instead of clipping the authored vine lane.
Keep spending actions away from the vine lane and urgent lower route.
Chase the safer upper target while the vine-pressure route remains unmanaged.
Add dock residue with neither the vine lane nor the lower rescue under control.
Start rerouting toward the lower puppy late, after dock pressure is already acute.
Try to recover the lower route too late and overflow the dock.

notes: Verified vine-exam fail branch: ignoring the early vine/urgent route now produces warned vine growth before the reroute pressure turns into dock overflow.
